summary: Branch does not implement the dashboard-first review templates or flattened traceability as specified; core rendering and template changes are missing.

requirement_checks.requirement: PASS review renders new Factory Review header without legacy clutter
evidence: scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs:897-1020 (buildReviewConversationBody appends legacy artifacts footer and does not accept review.json payload)

requirement_checks.requirement: REQUEST_CHANGES review shares layout and preserves detailed findings
evidence: scripts/templates/github-messages/review-request-changes.md:1-30 (still the legacy long-form layout with blocking lists and full review details)
scripts/lib/review-output.mjs:1-220 (rendering helpers produce nested details and full-review blocks)

requirement_checks.requirement: Traceability appears as a single collapsible block in both comment and review.md
evidence: scripts/lib/review-output.mjs:1-120 (function renderCanonicalTraceabilityMarkdown emits multiple <details> blocks rather than one flattened <details>)

requirement_checks.requirement: Update authoring prompt to omit manual methodology instruction
evidence: .factory/prompts/review.md:1-80 (still instructs reviewers to 'Include the methodology used')

requirement_checks.requirement: Refactor buildReviewConversationBody to accept normalized review payload and render new Factory Review summary block
evidence: scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs:860-1020 (current function signature: { reviewMarkdown, artifactsPath, maxBodyChars } without review payload)

findings.title: PASS and REQUEST_CHANGES templates not updated
findings.details: Both `scripts/templates/github-messages/review-pass-comment.md` and `scripts/templates/github-messages/review-request-changes.md` remain in the legacy format instead of the dashboard-first layout required by the spec.
findings.recommendation: Replace both templates with the shared 'Factory Review' layout and tokens as described in `.factory/runs/105/spec.md`. Update tests to match the new visible block and artifact links.

findings.title: Traceability rendering is nested instead of flattened
findings.details: `renderCanonicalTraceabilityMarkdown` emits a `<details>` block per requirement group rather than a single `<details>` wrapper containing plain markdown subsections.
findings.recommendation: Replace `renderCanonicalTraceabilityMarkdown` with a generator that emits one `<details>` wrapper (summary '🧭 Traceability') and plain markdown subsections inside, and adjust helpers accordingly.

findings.title: buildReviewConversationBody not refactored
findings.details: `buildReviewConversationBody` still accepts only `reviewMarkdown` and `artifactsPath`, appends a legacy artifacts footer, and does not accept `review.json` data needed to render the top summary block with counts and artifact links.
findings.recommendation: Refactor `buildReviewConversationBody` to accept the parsed `review.json` payload (or normalized review object) and render the `## Factory Review` summary block per spec; update truncation logic to anchor on the new traceability summary.

findings.title: Authoring prompt still requests manual methodology line
findings.details: The reviewer prompt at `.factory/prompts/review.md` still instructs authors to include the methodology in `review.md`, which would duplicate information once the summary block is injected.
findings.recommendation: Remove the instruction to restate the methodology from the prompt and clarify that the methodology will be injected automatically into the `Factory Review` summary block.

findings.title: Tests and snapshots will need rebaselining
findings.details: Several tests reference the current template bodies and snapshots; after updating templates and rendering helpers, tests in `tests/github-messages.test.mjs` and `tests/process-review.test.mjs` will require updates.
findings.recommendation: Update tests and snapshots to assert the new top-level Factory Review header, summary block, artifact links, and flattened traceability.
